name: Chicken Breasts w/ Tomato & Garlic
recipeIngredient: Boneless Chicken Breasts (2 whole breasts, halved)
recipeInstructions:
1. Season chicken with salt and pepper.
2. Heat olive oil in a pan over medium heat. Sear the chicken breasts on each side for 3 to 4 minutes, until browned.
3. Add minced garlic, chopped onions, white wine, tomatoes, bay leaf, and thyme (or rosemary/basil) to the pan.
4. Bring mixture to a boil, then reduce heat and simmer for 15 minutes, or until chicken is cooked through.
5. Discard bay leaf before serving.
